title: Cold fronts bring the chill factor for the weekend
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Another cold...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Another cold front is predicted to hit Cape Town tomorrow, with the rain arriving overnight and into Saturday for the Garden Route and parts of the Karoo.


> Your forecast for Friday:


Fine and cool to cold. It will become partly cloudy along the coast with isolated evening showers and rain in the extreme south-west.

The wind along the coast will be light to moderate north-westerly, becoming westerly at times.


> Karoo weather forecast for Friday:


Fine and cold to cool, but partly cloudy along the coast of the Eastern Cape.

The wind along the coast will be light to moderate north-westerly, becoming light and variable east of East London.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
